data.author: awesomebytes
data.message:
Fix error on loading stil by Rviz as they seem to be malformed

Error was
The STL file 'package://XXXX/meshes/finger_flex_collision.stl' is malformed. According to the binary STL header it should have '108' triangles, but it has too much data for that to be the case.

Seems to be fixed in upcoming Rviz (not released yet) https://github.com/ros-visualization/rviz/issues/913

+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)

+  install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/

+endforeach(dir)

+    <link name="${name}_link">

+
+    <xacro:position_reducer name="${name}" reduction="1.0"/>
+    <!-- TODO: Add grasp hack -->
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+ <!-- Position joint reducer -->
+  <xacro:macro name="position_reducer" params="name reduction" >
+    <transmission name="${name}_trans">

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+  Copyright (c) 2014, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!--External resources-->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find hey5_description)/urdf/deg_to_rad.urdf.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find hey5_description)/urdf/materials.urdf.xacro" />
+
+  <!--Constants-->
+  <xacro:property name="thumb_abd_min"   value="${  0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+  <xacro:property name="thumb_abd_max"   value="${ 90 * deg_to_rad}" />
+  <xacro:property name="finger_abd_min"  value="${-30 * deg_to_rad}" /> <!--TODO: Check-->
+  <xacro:property name="finger_abd_max"  value="${ 30 * deg_to_rad}" /> <!--TODO: Check-->
+  <xacro:property name="finger_flex_min" value="${  0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+  <xacro:property name="finger_flex_max" value="${ 45 * deg_to_rad}" />
+  <xacro:property name="finger_max_vel"  value="2.0" />                 <!--TODO: Check-->
+  <xacro:property name="finger_max_eff"  value="2.0" />                 <!--TODO: Check-->
+  <xacro:property name="finger_friction" value="0.0" />                 <!--TODO: Check-->
+  <xacro:property name="finger_damping"  value="0.5" />                 <!--TODO: Check-->
+
+  <xacro:property name="finger_d1"  value="0.009" />
+  <xacro:property name="finger_d2"  value="0.013" />
+
+  <!--
+    Set to "" to use separate visualization mesh, or to "_collision" to use
+    collision meshes for visualization as well
+  -->
+  <xacro:property name="vis_suffix"  value="" />
+
+  <!--
+    Create one non-thumb finger with one abduction/adduction joint and three
+    flexion/extention joints.
+
+    Parameters:
+    - name: Finger name. Finger links and joints are prepended with 'name_'
+    - parent: Parent link
+    - reflect: Set to 1 for a right hand, or to -1 for a left hand
+    - origin: XML block containing the pose of the first finger link with respect to its parent
+  -->
+  <xacro:macro name="finger" params="name parent reflect *origin mimic_source">
+    <!--Abductor-->
+    <xacro:finger_abd parent="${parent}" name="${name}_abd" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+    </xacro:finger_abd>
+
+    <!--First flexor-->
+    <xacro:finger_flex_virtual parent="${name}_abd_link" name="${name}_virtual_1" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d1} 0 0" rpy="${reflect * 90 * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_virtual>
+
+    <xacro:finger_flex_short parent="${name}_virtual_1_link" name="${name}_flex_1" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d2} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_short>
+
+    <!--Second flexor-->
+    <xacro:finger_flex_virtual parent="${name}_flex_1_link" name="${name}_virtual_2" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d1} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_virtual>
+
+    <xacro:finger_flex_short parent="${name}_virtual_2_link" name="${name}_flex_2" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d2} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_short>
+
+    <!--Third flexor-->
+    <xacro:finger_flex_virtual parent="${name}_flex_2_link" name="${name}_virtual_3" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d1} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_virtual>
+
+    <xacro:finger_flex_tip parent="${name}_virtual_3_link" name="${name}_flex_3" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d2} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_tip>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <!--
+    Create one thumb finger with one abduction/adduction joint and two
+    flexion/extention joints.
+
+    Parameters:
+    - name: Finger name. Finger links and joints are prepended with 'name_'
+    - parent: Parent link
+    - reflect: Set to 1 for a right hand, or to -1 for a left hand
+    - origin: XML block containing the pose of the first finger link with respect to its parent
+  -->
+  <xacro:macro name="thumb" params="name parent reflect *origin mimic_source">
+    <!--Abductor-->
+    <xacro:thumb_abd parent="${parent}" name="${name}_abd" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+    </xacro:thumb_abd>
+
+    <!--First flexor-->
+    <xacro:finger_flex_virtual parent="${name}_abd_link" name="${name}_virtual_1" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${0.0355 - finger_d2} 0.0033 0" rpy="${-reflect * 65.56 * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_virtual>
+
+    <xacro:finger_flex_short parent="${name}_virtual_1_link" name="${name}_flex_1" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d2} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_short>
+
+    <!--Second flexor-->
+    <xacro:finger_flex_virtual parent="${name}_flex_1_link" name="${name}_virtual_2" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d1} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_virtual>
+
+    <xacro:finger_flex_tip parent="${name}_virtual_2_link" name="${name}_flex_2" reflect="${reflect}">
+      <origin xyz="${finger_d2} 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mimic joint="${mimic_source}" multiplier="${finger_flex_max}" offset="0.0" />
+    </xacro:finger_flex_tip>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <!--
+    Create the abduction/adduction link and joint for a non-thumb finger.
+
+    Parameters:
+    - name: The created link and joint are prepended with 'name_'
+    - parent: Parent link
+    - reflect: Set to 1 for a right hand, or to -1 for a left hand
+    - origin: XML block containing the pose of the link with respect to its parent
+  -->
+  <xacro:macro name="finger_abd" params="name parent reflect *origin">
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${parent}" />
+      <child link="${name}_link" />
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${finger_abd_min}" upper="${finger_abd_max}" effort="${finger_max_eff}" velocity="${finger_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics friction="${finger_friction}" damping="${finger_damping}"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="-0.0018 0.0 0.0028" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <mass value="0.018" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.000000360" ixy="0.000000000" ixz="-0.000000059"
+                 iyy="0.000000808" iyz="0.000000000" izz="0.000000640" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://hey5_description/meshes/finger_abd${vis_suffix}.stl" scale="1 1 ${reflect}" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://hey5_description/meshes/finger_abd_collision.stl" scale="1 1 ${reflect}" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <!--
+    Create the abduction/adduction link and joint for a thumb finger.
+
+    Parameters:
+    - name: The created link and joint are prepended with 'name_'
+    - parent: Parent link
+    - reflect: Set to 1 for a right hand, or to -1 for a left hand
+    - origin: XML block containing the pose of the link with respect to its parent
+  -->
+  <xacro:macro name="thumb_abd" params="name parent reflect *origin">
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${parent}" />
+      <child link="${name}_link" />
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${thumb_abd_min}" upper="${thumb_abd_max}" effort="${finger_max_eff}" velocity="${finger_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics friction="${finger_friction}" damping="${finger_damping}"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="-0.0132 0.0037 -0.0017" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <mass value="0.014" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.000000290" ixy="0.000000078" ixz="-0.000000035"
+                 iyy="0.000000995" iyz="-0.000000020" izz="0.000000955" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://hey5_description/meshes/thumb_abd${vis_suffix}.stl" scale="1 1 ${reflect}" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://hey5_description/meshes/thumb_abd_collision.stl" scale="1 ${reflect} 1" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <!--
+    Create the auxiliary virtual link and joint used to model the rolling contact
+    coupling present in flexion/extension joints.
+
+    Parameters:
+    - name: The created link and joint are prepended with 'name_'
+    - parent: Parent link
+    - reflect: Set to 1 for a right hand, or to -1 for a left hand (currently unused)

+  -->

+
+  <!--Command source. TODO: Remove!-->
+  <xacro:macro name="cmd_source" params="name parent *origin">
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${parent}" />
+      <child link="${name}_link" />
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="0.0" upper="1.0" effort="10.0" velocity="20.0" /> <!--TODO: Check-->

+        <inertia ixx="0" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+
+
+  <!--
+    Create a complete hey5 hand (right or left).
+
+    Parameters:
+    - name: Hand name. The created links and joints are prepended with 'name_'
+    - parent: Parent link
+    - reflect: Set to 1 for a right hand, or to -1 for a left hand
+    - origin: XML block containing the pose of the palm link with respect to its parent
+  -->
+  <xacro:macro name="hey5_hand" params="name parent reflect *origin">
+    <!--Palm-->
+    <xacro:palm parent="${parent}" name="${name}_palm" reflect="${reflect}" >
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+    </xacro:palm>
+
+    <!--Command sources-->
+<!--    <xacro:cmd_source parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_thumb" >
+      <origin xyz="0.05 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+    </xacro:cmd_source>
+
+    <xacro:cmd_source parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_index" >
+      <origin xyz="0.05 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+    </xacro:cmd_source>
+
+    <xacro:cmd_source parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_mrl" >
+      <origin xyz="0.05 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+    </xacro:cmd_source>-->
+
+    <!-- Actuators -->
+    <xacro:thumb_actuator parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_thumb">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" /> <!-- TODO: Change! -->
+    </xacro:thumb_actuator>
+
+    <xacro:index_actuator parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_index">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" /> <!-- TODO: Change! -->
+    </xacro:index_actuator>
+
+    <xacro:mrl_actuator parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_mrl">
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" /> <!-- TODO: Change! -->
+    </xacro:mrl_actuator>
+
+    <!--Fingers-->
+    <xacro:thumb parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_thumb" reflect="${reflect}" mimic_source="${name}_thumb_joint">
+      <origin xyz="0.0911 0.0132 ${reflect * 0.038}" rpy="0 ${-reflect * 65 * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+    </xacro:thumb>
+
+    <xacro:finger parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_index" reflect="${reflect}" mimic_source="${name}_index_joint">
+      <origin xyz="0.1265 0.00399 ${reflect * 0.0265}" rpy="${-reflect * 90 * deg_to_rad} ${-reflect * 15 * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+    </xacro:finger>
+
+    <xacro:finger parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_middle" reflect="${reflect}" mimic_source="${name}_mrl_joint">
+      <origin xyz="0.1335 0.00399 ${reflect * 0.007}" rpy="${-reflect * 90 * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+    </xacro:finger>
+
+    <xacro:finger parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_ring" reflect="${reflect}" mimic_source="${name}_mrl_joint">
+      <origin xyz="0.1265 0.00399 ${reflect * -0.0125}" rpy="${-reflect * 90 * deg_to_rad} ${reflect * 5 * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+    </xacro:finger>
+
+    <xacro:finger parent="${name}_palm_link" name="${name}_little" reflect="${reflect}" mimic_source="${name}_mrl_joint">
+      <origin xyz="0.1165 0.00399 ${reflect * -0.032}" rpy="${-reflect * 90 * deg_to_rad} ${reflect * 15 * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+    </xacro:finger>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>
